# Engineering Task

## Task Name


## Problem Statement

What internal problem does this solve?


## Why This Matters

How does this make UWE easier to build, maintain, test, search, or expand?


## Current Situation

Describe how it works now.


## Desired Architecture

Describe how it should work after this task is complete.


## Constraints

- Follow AGENT_CONTEXT.md.
- Follow ARCHITECTURE.md.
- Avoid breaking existing functionality.
- Prefer incremental, drop-in improvements.
- Do not rewrite large parts of the app unless necessary.


## Files / Areas Likely Involved

List known files, folders, pages, routes, models, widgets, or data sources.


## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Existing behavior is preserved unless intentionally changed.
- [ ] Architecture is simpler or more maintainable.
- [ ] Related documentation is updated if needed.
- [ ] Existing pages still load.
- [ ] Search/navigation still work if affected.
- [ ] Code follows AGENT_CONTEXT.md and ARCHITECTURE.md.


## Testing Steps

List manual or automated checks needed.


## Notes / Future Ideas

Anything that should be considered later but not included in this task.
